fields.description:
## Actual Behavior
After running /dso:debug-everything and /dso:sprint sessions, sub-agent worktrees created via isolation: worktree are not being cleaned up. Worktrees accumulate on disk under the worktrees directory, leaving stale branches and wasting disk space.

## Expected Behavior
The _offer_worktree_cleanup auto-cleanup should remove worktrees that are (1) merged into main and (2) have a clean git status. After a session completes and changes are merged, sub-agent worktrees should be removed automatically.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Run /dso:debug-everything or /dso:sprint with worktree.isolation_enabled=true
2. Let the session complete and merge to main
3. Check for remaining worktrees on disk — sub-agent worktrees remain

## Environment
- worktree.isolation_enabled=true (default)
- Skills: /dso:debug-everything, /dso:sprint
